'''Fred Tatasciore''' (born [[June 13]]) is an American voice actor from [[Wikipedia:New York City|New York City]]. He has provided the voices for characters in dozens of cartoons, movies, and video games. For ''[[Star Wars]]'', he played [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]] in the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' micro TV series,<ref name="CW Chapter 21">{{CW|21}}</ref> [[Roos Tarpals]] in ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'',<ref name="TCW Gungan Attack">{{TCW|Gungan Attack}}</ref> [[Yushyn]] in ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'',<ref name="Rebels The Call">{{Rebels|The Call}}</ref> [[BL-OX/LEGO|BL-OX]] in ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures]]''<ref name="Freemaker Maker of Zoh">{{The Freemaker Adventures|The Maker of Zoh}}</ref> and [[Bolza Grool]] in ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]''.<ref name="The Recruit">{{Resistance|The Recruit}}</ref> He also voiced more than thirty characters for ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' and its expansions, including [[Soa]] and [[Juvard Illip Oggurobb]].<ref name="The Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref> Furthermore, he provided additional voices to ''Star Wars'' movies since [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']].<ref name="Film VII Voices">{{SW|url=news/from-blast-that-x-wing-to-traitor-the-voices-of-star-wars-the-force-awakens|text=From "Blast that X-Wing!" to "Traitor!": The voices of ''Star Wars: The Force Awakens''}}</ref>
